blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
